statement.en: Highthroughput in situ sizing and quantum yield determination of individual perovskite nanocrystals
statement.summary: Data set for the manuscript of the same title. Contains raw data in the form of tiff files and extracted values used for further analysis and generating the figures (generally .xlsx files).

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a dataset descriptor for experimental nanotechnology research (perovskite nanocrystals) with quantum yield measurements. The underlying experimental work is empirically grounded and partially formalizable, but the dataset itself is a provisional research artifact (dated 2026, preprint stage). The axiom's truth-value depends on validation of experimental protocols and reproducibility—not yet settled.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 量子粒子の輝きは、サイズと吸収の深さの共鳴から生まれる。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 光と物質が踊る—核は共振の中心、波は粒子の本質を呼び起こす。
